topics.zh_topic: 马修·韦尔当选所罗门群岛新总理
topics.en_topic: Matthew Wale elected as new Prime Minister of Solomon Islands
topics.zh_summary: 霍尼亚拉，5月15日（新华社）——根据所罗门群岛总督大卫·蒂瓦·卡普的宣布，马修·韦尔于周五被国会议员选举为所罗门群岛的新总理。韦尔是反对派领袖，在50个席位的议会中获得26票，击败了前外交和对外贸易部长彼得·沙内尔·阿戈瓦卡。韦尔将接替于5月7日被罢免的杰里迈亚·马内莱。韦尔生于1968年，2008年通过补选进入国会，曾在2019年和2024年竞选总理，但在2019年失利，成为反对派领袖。
topics.en_summary: HONIARA, May 15 (Xinhua) -- Matthew Wale has been elected as the new Prime Minister of the Solomon Islands by members of parliament, as announced by Governor General David Tiva Kapu. Wale, an opposition leader, received 26 votes in the 50-seat parliament, defeating former Minister for Foreign Affairs Peter Shanel Agovaka. He will replace Jeremiah Manele, who was removed from office on May 7 after a no-confidence motion. Born in 1968, Wale became a Member of Parliament in a 2008 by-election and served as Leader of the Opposition after losing the 2019 prime ministerial election.

topics.zh_summary: 阿布贾- 非洲联盟（AU）委员会主席穆罕默德·阿里·尤素夫和联合国（UN）秘书长安东尼奥·古特雷斯在埃塞俄比亚亚的斯亚贝巴的联合新闻发布会上警告称，外部干预正在加剧非洲的安全危机。两位领导人指出，资金、弹药甚至战斗人员从其他大陆流入，导致非洲各国冲突加剧。古特雷斯强调，外部国家对非洲冲突的干预是不可接受的，并指出现在的战争形式日渐严酷，损害了无辜民众。
topics.en_summary: In a press conference in Addis Ababa, AU Commission Chair Mahmoud Ali Youssouf and UN Secretary-General Antonio Guterres warned that external interference is exacerbating security crises in Africa. They stated that financial resources, ammunition, and fighters from outside are fueling conflicts across the continent. Guterres described such interference as intolerable and emphasized the need for diplomatic efforts to halt these actions. He also noted a worrying trend where civilians are increasingly targeted in modern warfare.

topics.zh_topic: 非盟与联合国领导人谴责外部势力干涉非洲安全危机
topics.en_topic: AU, UN leaders denounce external interference in Africa's security crisis
topics.zh_summary: 非洲联盟（AU）和联合国（UN）领导人在亚的斯亚贝巴联合新闻发布会上警告，外部干涉正在助长非洲的安全危机。AU委员会主席马哈茂德·阿里·尤素福表示，大陆上的安全危机大多受到外部势力的影响，包括资金、弹药及战斗人员的流入。他强调，非盟必须领导大陆和平谈判，并呼吁停止外部干预。联合国秘书长安东尼奥·古特雷斯指出，外部国家的干预是不可容忍的，且造成了对平民的严重伤害。他提到，世界正目睹一种新型战争，其中军事力量不直接对抗，而是通过无人机攻击平民。
topics.en_summary: The African Union (AU) and United Nations (UN) leaders denounced external interference fueling Africa's security crisis during a joint press conference in Addis Ababa. AU Commission Chairperson Mahmoud Ali Youssouf stated that most security crises on the continent are exacerbated by foreign involvement, which disrupts mediation efforts. He urged the AU to lead peace negotiations based on African solutions. UN Secretary-General Antonio Guterres condemned the intolerable external interference, highlighting the resulting civilian casualties. He noted a troubling trend of warfare involving drone attacks on civilians, emphasizing the need to halt such interventions.

topics.zh_topic: 辛纳创下大师赛最长连胜纪录并晋级四强
topics.en_topic: Sinner sets Masters 1000 winning streak record, reaches semifinals
topics.zh_summary: 意大利罗马，5月14日——世界排名第一的贾尼克·西纳在意大利公开赛男单四分之一决赛中以直落两盘击败12号种子安德雷·鲁布莱夫，成功将他的ATP大师赛百场连胜纪录扩展到32场。西纳在首盘以6-2轻松取胜，但在第二盘出现疲劳迹象，发球成功率降至39%，尽管他一度领先4-1，最终还是以6-4结束比赛。赛后，西纳表示身体状况良好，强调自己比赛的动力并非为了打破纪录，而是为了自己的故事。西纳将面对7号种子丹尼尔·梅德维德夫的半决赛对决，而女单方面，第3种子科科·高夫击败了罗马尼亚老将索拉娜·西尔斯泰亚，将与第7种子埃琳娜·斯维托丽娜争夺决赛资格。
topics.en_summary: Rome, May 14 — World No. 1 Jannik Sinner defeated 12th seed Andrey Rublev in straight sets in the quarterfinals of the Italian Open, extending his ATP Masters 1000 winning streak to a record 32 matches. Sinner won the first set 6-2, but showed signs of fatigue in the second set, experiencing a drop in his first-serve percentage to 39% before closing out the match 6-4. After the match, Sinner stated he felt fine and emphasized he plays for his own story, not for records. He will face seventh seed Daniil Medvedev in the semifinals. In the women's draw, third seed Coco Gauff defeated Romanian veteran Sorana Cirstea to set up a semifinal against seventh seed Elina Svitolina.

topics.zh_topic: 姆巴佩暗示在皇马将担任第四前锋角色
topics.en_topic: Mbappe hints at 'fourth striker' role at Real Madrid
topics.zh_summary: 在5月14日，皇家马德里在主场以2-0战胜了降级的皇家奥维多，尽管比赛对西甲联赛没有影响，但却突显了俱乐部的困难氛围。比赛中，年轻前锋冈萨洛·加西亚在上半场结束前打入首球，而裘德·贝灵汉在下半场追加第二球。巴黎圣日耳曼前锋基利安·姆巴佩在替补出场时遭到球迷嘘声，他在赛后表示自己是教练的“第四选择前锋”，并暗示球队炒掉前教练哈维·阿隆索是个错误。姆巴佩强调他需要努力恢复首发位置，并对本赛季未能赢得任何奖杯感到失望。
topics.en_summary: On May 14, Real Madrid secured a 2-0 victory over relegated Real Oviedo in a match that had no influence on La Liga standings, yet underlined the club's difficult atmosphere. Young striker Gonzalo Garcia opened the scoring just before half-time, with Jude Bellingham adding a second. Kylian Mbappe, who replaced Garcia 20 minutes from the end, was booed by fans and later stated he felt like the 'fourth-choice striker' under coach Alvaro Arbeloa, hinting that the January sacking of Xabi Alonso was a mistake. He expressed his desire to work hard for a starting position and reflected on a disappointing season where the team failed to win any titles.

topics.zh_topic: 中情局局长据报访问古巴
topics.zh_summary: 美国中央情报局局长约翰·拉特克利夫于5月14日在哈瓦那与古巴官员会面，讨论情报合作、经济稳定和安全问题。此次会议应美国政府请求，旨在推动古美两国在当前复杂背景下的政治对话。古巴重申，其不对美国国家安全构成威胁，并表示将加强执法合作。拉特克利夫在会见中传达了美国总统特朗普的信息，称美国准备在古巴进行经济和安全问题的认真接触，但前提是古巴需进行根本性改变。
topics.en_summary: On May 14, John Ratcliffe, the director of the CIA, met with Cuban officials in Havana to discuss intelligence cooperation, economic stability, and security issues. The meetings were held at the request of the U.S. government, aiming to promote political dialogue between the two nations amid complex relations. Cuba reiterated that it poses no threat to U.S. national security and expressed a willingness to enhance law enforcement cooperation. Ratcliffe conveyed President Trump's message that the U.S. is ready to engage on economic and security matters, but only if Cuba makes fundamental changes.

topics.zh_topic: 日本栃木县入室抢劫致1死2伤
topics.en_topic: Home robbery leaves 1 dead, 2 injured in Japan's Tochigi
topics.zh_summary: 日本栃木县发生一起入室盗窃事件，导致一名69岁母亲被刺身亡，另外两名儿子受伤。警方于当地时间周四上午9:30接到紧急电话，报告称该家人在家中遭到多名入侵者袭击。警方在附近街区逮捕了一名自称16岁的高中生，因涉嫌抢劫和谋杀，而其他嫌疑人仍在逃。报道指出，受害家庭在过去一个月曾多次向警方报告发现可疑车辆，事件发生后当局开始审查警方的反应是否足够。
topics.en_summary: In Tochigi Prefecture, Japan, a home invasion left one deceased and two injured. The victims, a 69-year-old mother and her two sons, were attacked in their home in Kaminokawa during a robbery. Police received an emergency call Thursday morning reporting the incident. The mother was found dead with stab wounds, while her sons sustained non-life-threatening injuries. A 16-year-old male suspect was arrested nearby after the attack on suspicion of robbery and murder, with additional suspects still at large. Reports indicate the family had previously contacted police regarding a suspicious vehicle near their home, prompting authorities to review the adequacy of their response.

topics.zh_topic: 中国加强新能源汽车安全监管
topics.en_topic: Chinese authorities step up safety oversight of new energy vehicles
topics.zh_summary: 中国副总理刘国中在云南省考察时强调要加强新能车安全监管，呼吁继续推进扶贫政策以促进农村振兴。他指出，必须防止大规模贫困返贫，并加强对扶贫项目的管理和监控。同时，他鼓励根据地方条件进行产业指导，提升农民收入，并加速发展贫困地区的关键县。刘还检查了农村生活环境改善及蚊媒疾病控制的工作，要求综合防控多种疾病，警惕进口病例。
topics.en_summary: Chinese Vice Premier Liu Guozhong emphasized the need for enhanced safety oversight of new energy vehicles during an inspection tour in Yunnan province. He called for continued efforts in poverty alleviation to support rural revitalization, stressing the importance of preventing large-scale poverty relapse and reinforcing management of poverty relief projects. Liu advocated for targeted industrial guidance based on local conditions to boost farmers’ incomes and accelerate development in key county-level regions. He also inspected local efforts in improving rural living conditions and controlling mosquito-borne diseases, urging integrated disease prevention and vigilance against imported cases.

topics.zh_topic: 韩国4月出口量实现两位数增长
topics.en_topic: S. Korea's export volume logs double-digit growth in April
topics.zh_summary: 2023年4月，韩国的出口量录得双位数增长。根据韩国银行的数据，受中东紧张局势影响，进口商品价格下降，进口价格指数较上月下降，制约了进口增长。具体来看，原材料进口价格大幅下跌，而中间品的价格小幅上涨。同时，出口价格指数较上月有所上升，显示出出口市场的复苏迹象。
topics.en_summary: In April 2023, South Korea's export volume experienced double-digit growth. According to central bank data, the import price index declined due to lower import prices, influenced by tensions in the Middle East. Import prices for raw materials dropped significantly, while prices for intermediate goods saw a slight increase. Meanwhile, the export price index rose compared to the previous month, indicating signs of recovery in the export market.

topics.zh_topic: 利比亚总理办公室发生火灾
topics.en_topic: Fire breaks out at Libyan PM's office amid violence
topics.zh_summary: 在利比亚首都的总理办公室内发生火灾，因在塔尔胡纳举行的足球比赛中爆发暴力冲突而引发。冲突起因于阿尔-伊蒂哈德队对裁判未判罚点球的不满，愤怒的球迷冲入场内并引发骚乱，导致球员遭袭和多辆车被焚烧。444旅派出武装部队恢复秩序，使用实弹驱散人群，造成一名士兵死亡和多人受伤。骚乱扩展至首都多地，部分示威者纵火焚烧总理办公室，安全部队加强了外交区和主要道路的警戒。利比亚当局尚未对此事件做出官方声明。
topics.en_summary: A fire broke out at the Libyan prime minister's office amid violence following a football match in Tarhuna. The unrest began when fans protested a referee's decision not to award a penalty to Al-Ittihad, leading to clashes in the stadium. Players were assaulted, and vehicles were set ablaze. Members of the 444 Brigade intervened, using live ammunition to disperse crowds, resulting in one soldier's death and several injuries. The violence spread to various areas in Tripoli, with some protesters setting parts of the prime minister's office on fire. Authorities have not yet issued an official statement regarding the incidents.
